summary: Frontend cloud platform for deploying web applications.
editor_note: Vercel made deployment a non-event. Push code, get a URL. That simplicity is their moat. The Next.js connection gives them an unfair advantage: they build the framework AND the best place to deploy it. Love it or question the vendor lock-in, the DX is undeniably best-in-class.
investors: Accel, GV (Google Ventures), Bedrock Capital, Greenoaks
